untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by expected returns (Rexp) and selecting top N and bottom N performers. This is a cross-sectional relative ranking strategy that cannot be expressed as simple indicator-based conditions on a single security. The strategy requires: (1) calculation of expected returns for all stocks in universe, (2) sorting/ranking across universe, (3) position sizing based on rank percentile (topN). The available indicators operate on single-security time-series data and lack the cross-sectional ranking and portfolio construction logic needed. Parameter 'topN' is also unspecified.
translation_notes: This is a market-neutral pairs/ranking strategy requiring portfolio-level logic (cross-sectional sorting) rather than single-security technical analysis. Implementation would require a custom ranking module outside standard indicator conditions. The CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction reflects that longs and shorts are determined by relative ranking, not absolute signal direction.
